_comment: Multi-Model Configuration — Example Template. Copy this file to models_settings.json and fill in your API credentials.
_instructions: Each model section requires: api_key (API key), api_base (endpoint URL), model (model name). Leave any field blank to fall back to the default DeepSeek config in .env.

REASONING_MODEL._comment: Primary reasoning model for complex tasks — multi-step reasoning, tool calling, code generation, search synthesis.

FLASH_MODEL._comment: Lightweight fast model for triage classification and simple conversations (greetings, small talk, /status). Low max_tokens to save cost.

MULTIMODAL_MODEL._comment: Vision-capable model for image understanding. Must support OpenAI-compatible vision API format (image_url content type). Examples: gpt-4o, claude-3-opus, Qwen2.5-VL.

AUDIO_MODEL._comment: Audio-capable model for voice message understanding. Must support OpenAI-compatible input_audio content type. Examples: gpt-4o-audio-preview, gemini-2.0-flash. Falls back to MULTIMODAL_MODEL if left empty.

task_routing._comment: Task routing rules — which model handles which task type. triage = model used for complexity classification. simple_task = model for simple conversations. complex_task = model for complex reasoning. image_analysis = model for multimodal image understanding. audio_analysis = model for audio/voice understanding.
task_routing.triage_prompt:
请判断以下用户消息的复杂度，只回复一个词'simple'或'complex'。

判断标准：
- simple: 简单问候、闲聊、已知事实询问、无需工具调用的常识问题
- complex: 需要搜索、需要执行代码、需要读取文件、需要多步推理、涉及专业知识

用户消息: {user_message}

复杂度:
